overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a teal-walled indoor waiting area with red abstract artwork and a service counter, then transitioning to a sunlit outdoor stone settlement environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi facility waiting corridor with service counter

agents.ego_description: walking away from the elevator down the corridor toward the service counter area

entered.detail: metal double doors with illuminated frame, starting position near character
large rectangular red artwork with organic shapes on the teal wall
simple metal seating along the corridor wall
green service desk with PLEASE WAIT signage and glass window
tall indoor plant in corner near the wall
circular metal ventilation fan mounted on wall
large framed picture of astronaut standing on rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow teal-walled corridor away from the elevator, passing red abstract art and benches. The service counter with PLEASE WAIT signage becomes visible on the right as the character approaches the end of the corridor where an astronaut painting hangs.

events.description: character stops at the astronaut painting and turns around to face back toward the elevator

agents.ego_description: stopping near the astronaut painting, then turning around to face the return direction

entered.detail: metal double doors visible again in the distance as character turns

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the corridor near the astronaut painting and service counter, then executes a turn to face back toward the elevator. The perspective shifts to show the elevator doors again in the distance while the red abstract painting moves across the frame.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily back toward the elevator doors at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks back down the corridor toward the elevator, with the metal doors growing larger in the frame. The red abstract painting slides along the left wall as the character approaches the elevator area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stone settlement with dirt ground

events.description: hard cut transition from indoor corridor to bright outdoor stone building environment

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator into a sunlit outdoor stone settlement area

entered.detail: rough stone wall with small windows, weathered texture
industrial metal container or barrel on the dirt ground
sunlit dirt and gravel ground surface

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly transitions to a bright outdoor environment with stone buildings and dirt ground, indicating the character has exited the indoor facility into a rural settlement area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile, teal-walled interior that abruptly transitions into a bright, sunlit outdoor settlement. It begins by following a character down a narrow corridor past red abstract art and benches, moving toward a service counter marked with PLEASE WAIT signage and a painting of an astronaut. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the camera pivots to face back toward the elevator, causing the red artwork to slide across the frame. The perspective then shifts as the character walks back down the corridor, with the metal elevator doors growing larger in the frame. Finally, the scene cuts from the enclosed indoor facility to a wide outdoor environment featuring stone buildings and dirt ground.
